title: Raiguri's Parcool HUD
description: Changes the HUD of the Parcool mod to be more esthetically friendly
body:
### Raiguri's Parcool HUD
I just don't like default hud of the [Parcool](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parcool), so thats why I made this RP.

#### Better stamina
![Better stamina](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sdStIwUC/images/43e4cd9f1adfa8a4819eaa38ed2f6fb57a20c173.gif)

#### Old stamina
